offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 claims/month, inaccurate claims reporting causes compliance issues. We prepare quarterly insurance claims audit reports instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate claims reporting leads to compliance issues and potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Participate in community forums for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for claims and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
